title: 11 Herbal Creams For Restless Leg Syndrome
description: Passiflora incarnata creams contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides. The flavonoids, including flavonol and flavanone, act as antioxidants, reducing inflammation in the legs. The alkaloids, such as harman, harmine, and harmaline, have a sedative effect, helping to calm the nervous system and relax muscles.
